---
title: "NIH3t3 analysis for bodyclocks"
output: github_document
---

```{r bodyclocks_setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = normalizePath(".."))
source(file.path("..", "R", "io_utils.R"))
source(file.path("..", "R", "annotation_utils.R"))
source(file.path("..", "R", "biomart_utils.R"))
source(file.path("..", "R", "string_utils.R"))
source(file.path("..", "R", "validation_utils.R"))
ensure_dir(file.path("..", "results", "tables"))
ensure_dir(file.path("..", "results", "reports"))
ensure_dir(file.path("..", "results", "shiny_data", "mouse"))
ensure_dir(file.path("..", "results", "shiny_data", "baboon"))
```

```{r libraries}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(rain)
library(biomaRt)
library(STRINGdb)
library(httr)
library(jsonlite)
```


```{r load_data}
nih3t3 <- read.csv("data/raw/NIH3T3_Forskolin.csv")


```



```{r collapse_duplicates}
duplicates <- nih3t3$ENSEMBL[duplicated(nih3t3$ENSEMBL) | duplicated(nih3t3$ENSEMBL, fromLast = TRUE)]
duplicates_df <- nih3t3[nih3t3$ENSEMBL %in% duplicates, c("ENSEMBL", "Symbol")]

# Microarray data often has multiple probes for the same gene, so we need to collapse these duplicates. We will keep the probe with the highest mean expression across all timepoints for each gene.
cleaned_data <- nih3t3 %>%
  # 1. Calculate the mean expression across all your timepoint columns
  # (Make sure to exclude your ID/Symbol columns from the math)
  mutate(mean_expr = rowMeans(dplyr::select(., -ENSEMBL, -Symbol))) %>%
  
  # 2. Group the data by the reliable Ensembl ID
  group_by(ENSEMBL) %>%
  
  # 3. For every duplicate, keep ONLY the one with the highest mean expression
  slice_max(order_by = mean_expr, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  
  # 4. Clean up the grouping and drop the temporary math column
  ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::select(-mean_expr, -Symbol)

cleaned_data <- as.data.frame(cleaned_data)
rownames(cleaned_data) <- cleaned_data$ENSEMBL
data <- cleaned_data[, -1]
```



```{r run_rain}
RAIN <- rain(t(data), deltat=1, period=24, nr.series = 1,
                peak.border=c(0.3, 0.7), method = "longitudinal", adjp.method='ABH', verbose=TRUE) # independent for mouse sampling, longitudinal can be used for cell culture

p_values <- RAIN$pVal

RAIN$BH.Q <- p.adjust(p_values, method = "BH")
RAIN$ENSEMBL <- row.names(RAIN)


# merge  RAIN  by row names with tendon_filtered  by ensemble ID
analysed <- merge(cleaned_data, RAIN, by.x = "ENSEMBL", by.y = "ENSEMBL", all.x = TRUE)
```



```{r annotate_genes}
# Set up the Ensembl BioMart connection
ensembl <- connect_biomart("mmusculus_gene_ensembl")
# Query Ensembl BioMart to get gene descriptions
gene_info <- get_biomart_annotation(
  ids = analysed$ENSEMBL,
  mart = ensembl,
  attributes = c("ensembl_gene_id", "mgi_symbol", "external_gene_name", "description"),
  filters = "ensembl_gene_id",
  cache_key = "nih3t3_gene_info"
)

# Prioritize MGI symbols, fall back to external_gene_name only if needed
gene_info <- gene_info %>%
  mutate(preferred_symbol = ifelse(!is.na(mgi_symbol) & mgi_symbol != "", 
                                  mgi_symbol, 
                                  external_gene_name))

# Ensure unique entries in gene_info
gene_info <- gene_info[!duplicated(gene_info$external_gene_name), ]

# Remove text within square brackets, including the brackets themselves
gene_info$description <- gsub("\\[.*?\\]", "", gene_info$description)

# Trim any trailing whitespace that might be left
gene_info$description <- trimws(gene_info$description)

merged <- merge(analysed, gene_info, by.x = "ENSEMBL", by.y = "ensembl_gene_id", all.x = TRUE)

# remove genes with NA in preferred_symbol (these are genes that had no mapping to MGI symbol or external gene name)
merged <- merged[!is.na(merged$preferred_symbol), ]
write.csv(merged, file = "results/tables/nih3t3_circ.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```



```{r prepare_string_nodes}
# Get STRING DB interaction data and functional enrichment

nodes_data <- merged %>%
    filter(BH.Q <= 0.05) %>%
    dplyr::rename(symbol = preferred_symbol)

# ENSEMBL gene IDs return more results than MGI symbols
gene_list <- nodes_data$ENSEMBL

# Create comprehensive gene mapping dictionary

# Create the mapping using your existing data
gene_mapping <- create_gene_mapping(
  gene_ids = merged$ENSEMBL,
  symbols = nodes_data$symbol
)

cat("Created mapping for", length(gene_mapping), "genes\n")

# Map STRING preferred names to MGI symbols
```

```{r build_string_network}
# Get protein-protein interactions and enrichment data using STRINGdb

# Function to get protein-protein interactions (edges)


# Function to get selected enrichment data

network_bundle <- get_string_network_bundle(
  gene_list = gene_list,
  gene_mapping = gene_mapping,
  species_id = 10090,
  nodes_data = nodes_data
)
edges <- network_bundle$edges_by_threshold
cluster_data <- network_bundle$cluster_data



phase_colors <- c(
  "0"  = "greenyellow",   # ZT0/24 - lights on/sunrise
  "1"  = "#9FF760",       # ZT1
  "2"  = "lightgreen",    # ZT2 - early morning
  "3"  = "#48F7C8",       # ZT3
  "4"  = "cyan",          # ZT4 - late morning
  "5"  = "#44E7F5",       # ZT5
  "6"  = "skyblue",       # ZT6 - noon (brightest)
  "7"  = "#C3E7E6",       # ZT7
  "8"  = "lightyellow",   # ZT8 - early afternoon
  "9"  = "#FFFF70",       # ZT9
  "10" = "yellow",        # ZT10 - late afternoon
  "11" = "#FFEB00",       # ZT11
  "12" = "gold",          # ZT12 - dusk/evening
  "13" = "#FFBE00",       # ZT13
  "14" = "orange",        # ZT14 - early evening
  "15" = "#FF7500",       # ZT15
  "16" = "orangered",     # ZT16 - late evening
  "17" = "#C02340",       # ZT17
  "18" = "purple",        # ZT18 - early night
  "19" = "#400080",       # ZT19
  "20" = "navy",          # ZT20 - night (darkest)
  "21" = "#000086",       # ZT21
  "22" = "darkblue",      # ZT22 - late night
  "23" = "#57805D",       # ZT23
  "24" = "greenyellow"    # ZT24 - same as ZT0
)

network_outputs <- build_string_network_outputs(
  cluster_data = cluster_data,
  nodes_data = nodes_data,
  gene_info = gene_info,
  gene_mapping = gene_mapping,
  phase_colors = phase_colors,
  phase_shift = -6
)

cluster_data <- network_outputs$cluster_data
nodes <- network_outputs$nodes
nodes_with_tooltips <- network_outputs$nodes_with_tooltips
cluster_for_plot <- network_outputs$cluster_for_plot
cluster_descriptions <- network_outputs$cluster_descriptions

save_string_network_outputs(
  outputs = network_outputs,
  edges = edges,
  output_dir = "results/shiny_data/mouse/nih3t3",
  prefix = "nih3t3"
)
```


```{r prepare_timeseries_data}
# Process data frame for plotting in bodyclocks shiny app
# Single sample per timepoint (no replicates), raw values stored as "mean" for compatibility
# Data spans CT20-CT67 (48h), sampled every 2h = 24 timepoints


ct_cols <- paste0("X", seq(20, 67, by = 1))
atlas_plotting <- merged[, c("preferred_symbol", ct_cols)]
colnames(atlas_plotting) <- c("Gene", as.character(seq(20, 67, by = 1)))

qval_df <- merged[, c("preferred_symbol", "BH.Q")]
colnames(qval_df) <- c("Gene", "BH.Q")

atlas_plotting_long <- pivot_longer(atlas_plotting, cols = !Gene, names_to = "time_point", values_to = "mean")
atlas_plotting_long <- inner_join(atlas_plotting_long, qval_df, by = "Gene")

save_rds_checked(atlas_plotting_long, file = "results/shiny_data/mouse/nih3t3/nih3t3_data.rds")

```



```{r compute_amplitude_display_table}
# Prepare data frame for display
# Average matched timepoints across the two 24h cycles:
# cycle 1 = CT20-CT43, cycle 2 = CT44-CT67 

ct_cycle1 <- paste0("X", seq(20, 43, by = 1))
ct_cycle2 <- paste0("X", seq(44, 67, by = 1))

dt <- merged
for (i in seq_along(ct_cycle1)) {
  dt[[ct_cycle1[i]]] <- rowMeans(merged[, c(ct_cycle1[i], ct_cycle2[i])])
}

means <- dt[, ct_cycle1]

min_val <- apply(means, 1, min)
max_val <- apply(means, 1, max)

Amp_fc_log2 <- log2(max_val / min_val)
Amp_fc <- max_val / min_val

dt <- cbind(dt, Amp_fc_log2, Amp_fc)

display_dt <- dt %>%
  dplyr::select(preferred_symbol, description, pVal, BH.Q, Amp_fc_log2, phase) %>%
  dplyr::rename(symbol = preferred_symbol) %>%
  arrange(BH.Q)

save_rds_checked(display_dt, file = "results/shiny_data/mouse/nih3t3/nih3t3_display_dt.rds")
```


```{r scratch}


```
